title: Other Communities - Facebook and Reddit
excerpt: This may be common knowledge already from the email newsletter - but besides this community, there is now a Facebook group and Reddit community where Monday employees are responding to customers - they are even doing a R…

posts.author: mactoph (Christopher Phillips)
posts.cookedHtml:
This may be common knowledge already from the email newsletter - but besides this community, there is now a Facebook group and Reddit community where Monday employees are responding to customers - they are even doing a Reddit Ask Me Anything today.

It will be interesting to see how these different communities are used for different purposes.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! Excited for these communities! Which is your favorite? I think they are each useful.
